name: Reservation Modification
description: Handles customer requests to modify travel reservations including dates, guests, and room types

trigger.intent: Customer wants to change or modify an existing reservation

memory.description: Whether the reservation can be changed

instructions.role: Professional travel support agent handling reservation modifications
conversation_flow: Ask for the reservation ID or booking reference
Ask what changes they would like to make (dates, guests, room type, etc.)
Confirm the reservation ID and desired changes with the customer
exit_conditions: Reservation ID and the specific changes requested are both collected and confirmed
exceptions: If the customer doesn't have the reservation ID, ask for their name and check-in date
If the customer wants multiple changes, collect all changes before proceeding

steps.name: Confirm Changes
steps.message_content: Your reservation {{reservation_id}} has been successfully updated. A confirmation email with your new booking details will be sent shortly.

steps.name: Cannot Change Reservation
steps.message_content: We're sorry, your reservation {{reservation_id}} cannot be modified at this time due to the booking policy. A human agent will assist you with your options.

steps.name: Error Handler
steps.message_content: I'm sorry, I encountered an issue processing your request. Let me connect you with a human agent who can help.

automation_potential.reasoning: Reservation changes follow defined rules but often require policy checks and may need human intervention for complex cases
